params.name: Rejuvenation Scroll
params.description: Rejuvenation spell is one of the most unfathomable dark magic. The caster needs to chant, establish a connection with the deceased's soul, and summon it into a well-kept corpse. The resurrected often suffer from loss of consciousness, self-judgment, and cognition, and will eventually be reduced to a walking corpse.
params.ss1:
Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail HP +10
Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
